signals.headline: Kremlin Welcomes US-Israel-Iran Two-Week Ceasefire Deal | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Kremlin Welcomes US-Israel-Iran Two-Week Ceasefire Deal | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The Kremlin confirmed on April 8, 2026, that it welcomes the last-minute two-week ceasefire agreement between the US, Israel, and Iran, emphasizing de-escalation and a shift to diplomatic talks while supporting no further military escalation.[1]
